soal: What animal has a head, belly, eyes, and legs all on its head?
I shave every day but my beard stays the same. Who am I?
What gets bigger the more you take away from it?
What has 13 hearts but no other organs?
What can you break just by saying its name?
What goes up and never comes down?
What can travel at the speed of light but has no mass?
I am not alive but I can die. What am I?
What has hands but cannot pick anything up?
If you have me, you want to share me. If you share me, you no longer have me. What am I?
What is always coming but never arrives?
The more you take, the more you leave behind. What is it?
What has a head and a tail but no body?
What falls but never breaks?
What can you see once in a year, twice in a week, but never in a day?
What has one eye but cannot see?
What can run but never walks, has a mouth but never talks?
What is full of holes but still holds water?
What is so light that even the world's strongest person cannot hold it for long?
The more you feed it the bigger it grows; give it water and it dies. What is it?
What goes through cities and fields but never moves?
I have branches, but no fruit, trunk, or leaves. What am I?
What has words but never speaks?
What has legs but cannot walk?
What has teeth but cannot bite?
What has a neck but no head?
What invention lets you see through a wall?
What can you catch but not throw?
I speak without a mouth and hear without ears. What am I?
What has cities but no houses, forests but no trees, and water but no fish?
